fields.name: Resonance
fields.description: What resonance is and how it shapes magic.

fields.name: The Durance
fields.description: The journey of magical self-discovery that awakens a practitioner's gift.

fields.name: Traditions
fields.description: Schools of magic and how practitioners are trained.

fields.name: Smiling Shadows
fields.description: The shadow-wielding tricksters who treat darkness as a tool and a stage.

fields.name: The Vigil
fields.description: The solemn wardens of ancient rites who tend the city beneath the Shroud.

fields.name: Masque
fields.description: The forbidden tradition of Luxen's underworld, hidden behind theatrical personas.

fields.name: Umbral Guard
fields.description: The military magical tradition of the Umbral Empire.

fields.name: The Silken Thread
fields.description: A secret society of domination magic shared between empires.

fields.name: Sanguinus
fields.description: The foremost practitioners of blood magic, founded by the Blood Patriarch.

fields.name: Furyborn
fields.description: The berserker tradition of primal rage and savage instinct.

fields.name: Late Cardian
fields.description: The scholarly tradition studying the legacy of ancient dragons.

fields.name: Envalan
fields.description: Worshippers of the Goddess of Corruption who wield emerald witchfire.

fields.name: Unbound
fields.description: Self-taught practitioners with no formal tradition, raw and unrefined.

fields.name: Metallic Order
fields.description: The oldest living magical tradition in the world, preserved unchanged in Arx since before the Shroud rose.

fields.name: Fractals of the Abyss
fields.description: The warded study of mirror and Abyss, tended in Death's city rather than burned.

fields.name: The Red Feast
fields.description: The priesthood of the Fleshreaper, shared between the Lycan war clans of Ariwn and the Northlands.

fields.name: The Old Troth
fields.description: Keepers of the geas-sworn troth between the Aythir and the spirits of storm, sky, land, and beast.

fields.name: Order of the Lys
fields.description: The extinguished paladin order of the old Kingdom of Luxen, burned by the Holy Revolution.

fields.name: The Lumenaires
fields.description: The old court's kindly radiant mages, first to burn in the revolution.

fields.name: La Chasse
fields.description: The royal hunt's monster-hunting craft, extinguished — and stolen — by the revolution.

fields.name: Deathspeakers
fields.description: The order that speaks to the dead, and avenges them, and is fed by the avenging.
